candidatePatterns.note: URL path substrings that suggest a new sitemap entry is a credit card product page rather than an unrelated page (blog, offers, T&Cs, etc). Matching is case-insensitive substring match against the URL path.

changeDetection.note: requestDelayMs is a polite delay between consecutive page fetches to the same issuer during content-hash change detection, to avoid tripping issuer WAFs. Set enabled to false to skip change detection entirely and only track new launches.
